ChartOfAccount.title: ChartOfAccount
ChartOfAccount.description: Represents a single account within the Chart of Accounts, providing the foundational structure for all financial entries.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChartOfAccount entity.

accountCode.description: The unique hierarchical code assigned to the account (e.g., '101.10.0000').

accountName.description: The descriptive name of the account (e.g., 'Fixed Deposit Receipt (FDR)').

accountType.description: The classification of the account (e.g., Asset, Liability, Income, Expense, Contra-Asset).

normalBalance.description: The side (Debit or Credit) on which increases to the account are recorded.

parentAccountCode.description: The account code of the parent account in the hierarchy. (Relationship: ChartOfAccount 1:N ChartOfAccount)

Member.title: Member
Member.description: Stores information about a member (employee) of the CPF, used for tracking individual contributions, loans, and generating subsidiary ledgers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Member entity.

memberIdNumber.description: The unique identification number assigned to the member by PBS.

name.description: The full name of the member.

designation.description: The official job title or designation of the member.

dateJoined.description: The date when the member joined the organization.

currentAddress.description: The current residential address of the member.

permanentAddress.description: The permanent residential address of the member.

zonalOffice.description: The zonal office associated with the member.

dateNomination.description: The date of the member's provident fund nomination.

JournalEntry.title: JournalEntry
JournalEntry.description: Represents a complete financial transaction in the general ledger, comprising one or more debit and credit line items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JournalEntry entity.

entryDate.description: The date when the journal entry was recorded.

description.description: A general description of the entire journal entry.

referenceNumber.description: An optional external reference number associated with the transaction (e.g., voucher number, invoice number).

memberId.description: Reference to the Member if the journal entry is specifically related to a member's activity (e.g., contribution, loan). (Relationship: Member 1:N JournalEntry)

createdAt.description: The date and time when this journal entry was created in the system.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when this journal entry was last updated.

JournalEntryLineItem.title: JournalEntryLineItem
JournalEntryLineItem.description: Represents a single debit or credit line within a Journal Entry, detailing the specific account and amount affected.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JournalEntryLineItem entity.

journalEntryId.description: Reference to the parent JournalEntry this line item belongs to. (Relationship: JournalEntry 1:N JournalEntryLineItem)

chartOfAccountId.description: Reference to the ChartOfAccount entry affected by this line item. (Relationship: ChartOfAccount 1:N JournalEntryLineItem)

debitAmount.description: The amount debited to the account. Should be 0 if it's a credit.

creditAmount.description: The amount credited to the account. Should be 0 if it's a debit.

lineDescription.description: A specific description for this individual line item, if different from the overall journal entry description.

InvestmentInstrument.title: InvestmentInstrument
InvestmentInstrument.description: Details about a specific investment instrument held by the CPF, such as an FDR or a bond, used for tracking and accruals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvestmentInstrument entity.

bankName.description: The name of the bank or financial institution issuing the instrument.

chartOfAccountId.description: Reference to the ChartOfAccount representing this type of investment (e.g., FDR, Savings Certificate). (Relationship: ChartOfAccount 1:N InvestmentInstrument)

instrumentType.description: The specific type of investment instrument (e.g., FDR, Savings Certificate, Govt. Treasury Bond).

referenceNumber.description: A unique identifier or certificate number for this specific investment instrument.

issueDate.description: The date when the investment instrument was issued or acquired.

maturityDate.description: The date when the investment instrument matures (if applicable).

interestRate.description: The annual interest rate of the investment, as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

accrualFrequency.description: How often interest is typically accrued for this instrument (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Annually).

lastAccrualDate.description: The last date on which interest was accrued and recorded for this instrument.

status.description: The current status of the investment instrument (e.g., Active, Matured, Closed).

AccruedInterestLog.title: AccruedInterestLog
AccruedInterestLog.description: Records each instance of calculated accrued interest, whether from investments or member loans, prior to being posted to the general ledger.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AccruedInterestLog entity.

accrualDate.description: The date when the interest was calculated and accrued.

chartOfAccountId.description: Reference to the ChartOfAccount representing the accrued interest asset (e.g., Accrued Interest on FDR). (Relationship: ChartOfAccount 1:N AccruedInterestLog)

sourceId.description: Reference to the source entity from which the interest is accrued (e.g., InvestmentInstrument ID or Member ID for a loan).

sourceType.description: Indicates the type of source for the accrued interest (e.g., 'InvestmentInstrument' or 'MemberLoan').

grossAmount.description: The gross amount of interest accrued before taxes.

tdsAmount.description: The Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) amount (e.g., 10%).

netAmount.description: The net amount of interest after TDS.

periodStartDate.description: The start date of the period for which this interest was accrued.

periodEndDate.description: The end date of the period for which this interest was accrued.

isPostedToGL.description: A boolean indicating whether a corresponding journal entry has been created for this accrued interest.

MemberFundSummary.title: MemberFundSummary
MemberFundSummary.description: A snapshot entity that stores the balances for a member's provident fund and loan activities at a specific point in time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MemberFundSummary entity.

memberId.description: Reference to the Member whose fund summary this record represents. (Relationship: Member 1:N MemberFundSummary)

summaryDate.description: The date for which this record is valid.

employeeContribution.description: Column 1: Employee's contribution for the period.

lastUpdateDate.description: The date and time when this record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores the global chart of accounts, serving as the foundational structure for all financial entries. Read access typically granted to all authenticated users for lookup; write access restricted to administrators.

Stores individual member (employee) details, including basic information for provident fund tracking. CRUD operations are restricted to administrators. Each member can read their own `Member` document. This path directly reflects the `memberId` for path-based authorization.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the member.

definition.description: Stores individual financial transactions, comprising multiple line items. CRUD operations are restricted to administrators. Includes `memberId` for direct linking to member-related transactions, supporting authorization independence for potential member-specific queries.

params.name: journalEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the journal entry.

definition.description: A subcollection for individual debit/credit line items associated with a parent `JournalEntry`. Authorization is inherited from the parent `JournalEntry`, with `journalEntryId` implicitly available in the path.

params.name: journalEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent journal entry.

params.name: lineItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the journal entry line item.

definition.description: Stores details of various investment instruments held by the CPF. CRUD operations are restricted to administrators.

params.name: instrumentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the investment instrument.

definition.description: Records each instance of calculated accrued interest. CRUD operations are restricted to administrators. Includes `sourceId` and `sourceType` for linking to either an `InvestmentInstrument` or a `Member` (for loans).

params.name: accrualLogId
params.description: The unique identifier of the accrued interest log entry.

definition.description: A subcollection storing periodic provident fund and loan movements for a specific member at a given date.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the member to whom this fund summary belongs.

params.name: summaryId
params.description: The unique identifier for this specific fund summary record (e.g., date-based ID).

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is updated to store periodic movement fields for MemberFundSummary, which allows the UI to calculate running balances and cumulative totals as required by REB Form 224.
